broken-arm-nebula.name: Broken Arm Nebula
broken-arm-nebula.description: Largest nebula in the galaxy that also happens to have the lowest stellar density. Quite pretty from a distance, but not much to do there.

brighton.name: Brighton
brighton.description: Commecha Station, ultra-elite rec station for the ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€ Ã¢â‚¬â„¢ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Â ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…Â¡ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¼ber-wealthy. Closest to the Supermassive Black Hole, between Nimbus and Verdessa.

nimbus.name: Nimbus
nimbus.description: Closest to Grupp, between Supermassive Black Hole and Sapphire Fields.

verdessa.name: Verdessa
verdessa.description: Closest to Smelt Worlds, between Sublex and Gas-N-Gripe 12.

celebros.name: Celebros
celebros.description: Closest to Brighton, between Verdessa and Mornell.

sublex.name: Sublex
sublex.description: Closest to Smelt Worlds, between Verdessa and Flipsulon.

propheta.name: Propheta
propheta.description: Executive Suite - a small ultra urban planet where the Board administration is housed. Closest to Cerulean Plains, rimward of Tuskan.

flipsulon.name: Flipsulon
flipsulon.description: Between Sapphire Fields and Smelt Worlds. Raddest planets in the galaxy with the sickest orbits.

nj12.name: NJ12
nj12.description: Galaxy's first known pulsar. Closest to Cerulean Plains, spinward of Walpurg.

elysium.name: Elysium
elysium.description: Heavily shielded science station in close orbit around the galaxy's only known pulsar.
elysium.notes: Heavily shielded science station in close orbit around the galaxy's only known pulsar.

walpurg.name: Walpurg
walpurg.description: Closest to First Galactic War Ruin Zone, spinward of Coward's Crossing.

mercgolia.name: Mercgolia
mercgolia.description: Rimward of Padania, spinward of Kipple.

dunroid.name: Dunroid
dunroid.description: Between Vopva and Plopidor. Closest Gas-N-Gripe 16.

wodden.name: Wodden
wodden.description: Multiple massive stations in orbit around high-resource planets. Rimward of Propheta, spinward of Fonox.

ivutlis.name: Ivutlis
ivutlis.description: Between Halcyon, Durury, and the Hungry Sun.

vadfiner.name: Vadfiner
vadfiner.description: Rimward of Gas-N-Gripe 6. Stripped-envelope massive star; extreme stellar winds have scoured, ablated, or ejected any former planetary system.
vadfiner.notes: Ships give it a wide berth.

caronia.name: Caronia
caronia.description: Closest to Rho Bees, between Rho Bees and Phytos.

rho-bees.name: Rho Bees
rho-bees.notes: Planetary territory in contention between independent X-faction and NGC. Active conflict zone.

durury.name: Durury
durury.description: G4 subgiant primary of the Durury system. Closest to Bruminax, spinward of Padania.

neotypian.name: Neotypian
neotypian.description: M dwarf companion to Durury. Originally misidentified as a planet due to extremely low luminosity. 7 orbiting moons.

bruminax.name: Bruminax
bruminax.description: Between Halcyon and Durury, rimward of Coward's Crossing.

alfpas.name: Alfpas
alfpas.description: Closest to Rho Bees, between Rho Bees and Gas-N-Gripe 5.

steepborto.name: Steepborto
steepborto.description: Closest to Gantropic, between Gantropic and Comoda.

fonox.name: Fonox
fonox.description: Between Wodden and Gas-N-Gripe 14, rimward of NJ12.

vamburdia-lesser.name: Vamburdia Lesser
vamburdia-lesser.description: Between Los Kuaran and Vamburdia Greater.

vopva.name: Vopva
vopva.description: Coreward of Dunroid, closest to Sapphire Fields.
vopva.notes: Equal share of system between the big 3.

gantropic.name: Gantropic
gantropic.description: Closest to Steepborto, rimward of Halcyon.

the-hungry-sun.name: The Hungry Sun
the-hungry-sun.description: Dying red giant consuming its own planetary system. Closest to Ivutlis, rimward of Halcyon.
the-hungry-sun.notes: Orbital destabilization leading to planetary destruction underway.

amary.name: Amary
amary.description: Being devoured by The Hungry Sun.
amary.subtitle: devoured first

ligroman.name: Ligroman
ligroman.description: Closest to the Hungry Sun, between Ivutlis and Sunurdan.

homi-eaomi.name: Homi Eaomi
homi-eaomi.description: Closest to Comoda, spinward of Majestlon.

inebrax-station.name: Inebrax Station
inebrax-station.description: Where the player crew is currently docked. In the Homi Eaomi system.

majestlon.name: Majestlon
majestlon.description: Closest to Homi Eaomi, rimward of Steepborto.

halcyon.name: Halcyon
halcyon.description: Closest to Gantropic, spinward of Bruminax.

osminok.name: Osminok
osminok.description: K5V orange dwarf in the far outer rim.
osminok.notes: 0.7 solar masses, 0.3 solar luminosities, ~6 billion years old.

osminok-i.name: Little Shadow
osminok-i.description: The Persistent Little Shadow That Chases The Light And Avoids Our Gaze

ocean-home.name: Osminok Prime
ocean-home.description: The Endless Ocean That Is Our Treasured Home Despite Its Many Dangers. Gaby's homeworld!
ocean-home.notes: 0.9 Earth radii, 1.15g, 0.55 AU, 180 malton unit orbit, 18-marbec malton unit, 35ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€ Ã¢â‚¬â„¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¡ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…Â¡ÃƒÆ’Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â° axial tilt, 2.5 bar atmosphere. ~99% ocean coverage.

tsunari.name: Tsunari
tsunari.description: The Dead Sister Waving Through The Storms
tsunari.notes: 0.3 Earth masses, ~180,000 km orbit, ~8 malton unit period.

osminok-iii.name: Red Wanderer
osminok-iii.description: The Wanderer Of Red And Orange Whose Calls Still Echo In The Black
osminok-iii.notes: 4 Earth masses, 1.8 AU, 50+ bar, 11-marbec rotation. 9 moons.

rw-moon-9.name: RW-9
rw-moon-9.notes: 0.1 Earth masses. Largest moon of Red Wanderer.

osminok-iv.name: Blue Watcher
osminok-iv.description: The Bright Blue Eye That Watches Us Fondly From A Great Distance

osminok-v.name: Ossuary
osminok-v.description: The Cold Small Rock That Has Hidden From Us Always And Saddens Us
osminok-v.notes: 0.08 Earth masses, ~8 AU, highly elliptical orbit.

osminok-vi.name: Silent Stone
osminok-vi.description: The Unturned Stone That Waits In Silence At The Edge Of The Shelf
